hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) merged=$(git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline 2>/dev/null | head -3); if [ -n "$merged" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "BLOCKED: The current branch appears to already be merged into origin/main. Any new commits must go on a fresh branch cut from origin/main (git checkout -b new-branch origin/main). Verify with: git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline"}'; exit 0; fi;; esac; echo '{"continue": true}'
